auth.name: Name
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter the email address you registered with and we'll send you a password reset link.
auth.resetLinkSentDesc: A password reset link has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.resetEmailFailed: Failed to send. Please verify your email address is correct.
auth.resetStep2: Click the reset link (valid for 30 min)
auth.resetStep3: Set a new password and sign in

notFound.title: Lost in the Void
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved to another dimension.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized. Please login.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

home.title: Build Modern Apps with
home.description: An enterprise-grade full-stack template integrating NestJS backend and Next.js frontend, with built-in authentication, caching, and internationalization.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade features out of the box, so you can focus on business logic

nestjs.title: NestJS Backend
nestjs.description: Modular architecture, dependency injection, decorator syntax for maintainable enterprise backend services

nextjs.title: Next.js Frontend
nextjs.description: Server-side rendering, static generation, App Router for exceptional user experience

auth.title: JWT Authentication
auth.description: Dual token mechanism, token blacklist, Passport strategies for secure authentication

redis.title: Redis Cache
redis.description: High-performance caching, session storage, token blacklist to boost application performance

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: next-intl integration, multi-language routing, dynamic switching for global users

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: Full-stack type safety, intelligent hints, refactor-friendly for fewer runtime errors

architecture.title: Modern Architecture
architecture.description: A front-end and back-end separated yet tightly integrated architecture that maintains development flexibility while providing a unified deployment experience.
architecture.frontendDesc: Server-side rendering, static generation, App Router with Tailwind CSS for exceptional user experience.
architecture.backendDesc: Modular architecture, dependency injection, decorator syntax for maintainable enterprise services.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.subtitle: Get your full-stack application running in three simple steps

step1.title: Clone Project
step1.desc: Clone the repository and install dependencies

step2.title: Configure Environment
step2.desc: Set up database connection and Redis cache

step3.title: Start Server
step3.desc: Run development server and start building

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Start building your next full-stack application today

register.title: Join Us
register.description: Create an account and start your full-stack development journey
